sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 77:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 77:1
items.html: Malchut of the upper one becomes the Keter of the lower one. In other words, the will to bestow in the upper one becomes the first substance of the lower one (See answer 143).
